packages.nexocore.math:
<3 NPL Core Module: Math
do abs(n) {
    if n < 0: { return 0 - n }
    return n
}
packages.nexocore.io:
<3 NPL Core Module: IO
do print_border() { write "----------------------------------------" }
do prompt(msg) { write msg; return read }
packages.nexocore.system:
<3 NPL Core Module: System
do sleep(ms) { Sleep(ms) }
do time_now() { return SystemTime() }
do random(min, max) { return Random(min, max) }
do assert(cond, msg) { if cond == 0: { write "[FATAL SYSTEM ASSERTION ERROR] " + msg; c = 1 / 0 } return 1 }
do clear() { ClearConsole() }
packages.nexocore.strings:
<3 NPL Core Module: Strings
do length(str) { return StringLength(str) }
do upper(str) { return StringUpper(str) }
do lower(str) { return StringLower(str) }
do replace(str, target, rep) { return StringReplace(str, target, rep) }
do contains(str, phrase) { return StringContains(str, phrase) }
packages.nexocore.file:
<3 NPL Core Module: Files
do read_text(path) { return FileRead(path) }
do write_text(path, contents) { FileWrite(path, contents) }
do exists(path) { return FileExists(path) }
